title: Nostalgia Blocks
description: Use Classic textured Minecraft blocks without resource packs and build to your heart's old content!
body:
Welcome to Nostalgia Blocks! In this mod you will be introduced to the varitey of old minecraft blocks of old minecraft. With a stonecutter you can recreate old blocks and place them into your world! No need for a resource pack when this mod makes it simple to use! 

Features:
- Classic Minecraft Blocks
- Fightable Boss Character
- OG Leather Armor
- OG Diamond Sword (Better than Netherite!)
- A fun time!
